fields.indication_summary: Macrolide antibacterial drug indicated for mild to moderate infections caused by designated, susceptible bacteria: community-acquired pneumonia in adults and pelvic inflammatory disease in adults, by the intravenous route.
fields.dosage_forms_strengths: Single-dose vial of white to off-white lyophilized powder equivalent to 500 mg of azithromycin for intravenous administration

notes: This is the IV-injection ZITHROMAX label, not the more common oral tablet/suspension label -- indications are limited to CAP and PID, much narrower than oral azithromycin. Has two distinct, both-legitimate 'Revised:' dates: the Prescribing Information body says 1/2022, while the SPL document's trailing establishment block says 2/2025 -- a 3-year gap, same administrative-resubmission pattern as PREVNAR 20 in this sample set. ndc is the single-dose vial (0069-0400-01); the carton configuration 0069-0400-10 'Contains 10 of NDC 0069-0400-01', so the vial NDC is the representative unit. No boxed warning: page 0 has only the ordinary WARNINGS AND PRECAUTIONS section (a naive 'WARNING' string match would false-positive here).
